tagline: The new SQL editor (Public Preview) includes the following user interface improvements: Enhanced download experience: Query outputs are automatically named after the query when downloaded.
what_it_does: The new SQL editor (Public Preview) includes the following user interface improvements: Enhanced download experience: Query outputs are automatically named after the query when downloaded. Keyboard shortcuts for font sizing: Use Alt + and Alt (Windows/Linux) or Opt + and Opt (macOS) to quickly adjust font size in the SQL editor. User mentions in comments: Tag specific users with @ in comments to send them email notifications.
